_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of DOD Component-level cybersecurity architecture.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI governance framework components, including AI system registries, tiered review processes, impact assessment methodologies, and post-deployment monitoring requirements.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-010 (AI, cosine: 0.491), SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.455).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.286). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, component, cybersecurity, dod, level] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, components, deployment, framework, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.890, R=0.858). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.3%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of DOD Component-level cybersecurity architecture." and "Knowledge of AI governance framework components, including AI system registries,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.502 > STS 0.286 (gap +0.216). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [architecture, component, cybersecurity, dod, level]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, components, deployment, framework, governance].
